description: Customers currently call support to ask whether their account is healthy. A self-service dashboard showing key health signals (open tickets, outstanding actions, recent NPS) would deflect a lot of those calls and give customers a single place to check in.

Today every inbound complaint is hand-tagged for category and severity. An AI-assisted categorization pass would reduce intake time and surface duplicate complaints earlier. Should integrate with the existing complaints queue rather than replace it.
admin_comments: Possible overlap with the Automated Insights tagging work — confirm scope before approving.

idea_name: Add export-to-CSV on the activity log
description: Compliance team has asked for a CSV export of the activity log filtered by date range and user. Currently the only option is a screenshot.
